title: Solutions Consultant
description:
Area of Responsibility:


Presales Consultant is an important role KM’s Office Solutions team. In Singapore, we pride ourselves and our strength to WIN over competition has always been our strength in differentiating from the competition with Office Solutions and also WINNING deals with the winning propositions from Office Solutions. The candidate’s main responsibility is to lead office solutions fact finding, proposals and presentation requirements in collaboration and support to the sales leaders and sales reps.


Essential Job Functions:

  1. Develop and provide leading edge services, solutions and offerings which meet customers’ needs based on current and emerging technologies or business trends with company’s products (along with those from third parties where necessary) by understanding customers’ needs in office environment and providing consultative technical expertise on business solutions
  2. Demonstrate software solutions and articulate the benefits of solutions, e.g. technical benefits for technical audiences, business benefits for commercially oriented audiences
  3. Interface and work with both internal and external parties to deliver solutions i.e. change how companies work and not just selling a product
  4. Support business activities and project implementation by providing direct technical assistance including technical support and training when required
  5. Lead technical presentations, solution workshops, and proof-of-concepts.
  6. Design Solutions Architecture with simple design and complex clustering & high availability architecture with application failover or leveraging customer infrastructure.
  7. For career growth, technical involvement along with BDSG for Managed IT Services and Infrastructure (endpoint management, RMM tools, backup, security, cloud migration, networking and etc)
  8. Drive continuous improvement and ensure customer satisfaction through post-deployment support and review
  9. Any other duties assigned by Management from time to time

Requirements:


1. Degree/Diploma in Engineering, Computer Science or IT

2. At least 1 years of relevant working experience

3. Strong interpersonal, analytical and communication skills

4. Good project and organisation skills and able to work independently

5. Excellent negotiation skills

6. Appreciates technology and how technology can help corporate customers overcome challenges at work with technology

postedCompany.description:
Konica Minolta Business Solutions Asia is a leader in print and enterprise content management focusing on optimisation, productivity and information sharing via its broad range of office and production printing solutions and services. Backed by strong service standards and proficient support staff, Konica Minolta has won numerous awards and recognition, including placement in the Leaders Quadrant on the Gartner 2014 Magic Quadrant for Managed Print Services (MPS) and Managed Content Services (MCS). Konica Minolta, Inc. has also been named to the Dow Jones Sustainability World Index for four years in a row.

In line with our business expansion plans, we are now seeking highly dynamic and dedicated individuals to join our team. 

 

Join us in bringing forth solutions that will transform working styles!
postedCompany.name: KONICA MINOLTA BUSINESS SOLUTIONS ASIA PTE. LTD.

districts.location: D05 Clementi New Town, Hong Leong Garden, Pasir Panjang
